title: Herbed Poached Salmon
description: Delicate salmon fillet poached to perfection with a blend of fresh herbs.
instructions: Rinse the salmon fillets under cold water, pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large saucepan, combine chilled water and herbed butter.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and create a poaching liquid.
Add the chopped parsley and dill to the poaching liquid.
Season the poaching liquid with salt and pepper to taste.
Carefully add the salmon fillets to the poaching liquid.
Poach for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Remove the salmon from the poaching liquid with a slotted spoon.
Serve with lemon wedges on the side.
